lines.english: As long as she lived with her father,
In worship, marriage and in the next world, such a soul-bride looks beautiful. ||1||Pause||
her Husband wandered around in sadness.
I served and surrendered to the Lord, the True Being;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਆਣੀ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਤਾ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur aanee ghar meh taa sarab sukh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: the Guru brought my bride to my home, and I obtained total happiness. ||2||
Her Husband, her Lord and Master, fulfills her heart's desires.
And her generations are unblemished.
She is blessed with all sublime attributes,
Hope and desire (my younger brother-in-law and sister-in-law) are now totally content. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhan su grihu jit pragattee aae |
lines.english: How blessed is that household, in which she has appeared.
She counsels and advises her hope and desire.
She is the most noble of all the family.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਾ ਕਰਉ ਸੋ ਪਕਨਿ ਨ ਦੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: mataa krau so pakan na deee |
lines.english: Whatever I resolve, she does not allow it to come to pass.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
O servant Nanak, she passes her time in perfect peace and comfort. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਬਸਨਿ ਨ ਦੇਈ ਵਖਿ ਵਖਿ ਭਰਮਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: grihi basan na deee vakh vakh bharamaavai |1|
lines.english: and she does not allow me to dwell in my own home. She forces me to wander around in different directions. ||1||
She stands blocking the way of goodness and self-discipline.
She wears many disguises, and assumes many forms,
If I try, she fights with me. ||1||Pause||
In the beginning, she was sent as a helper,

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਕੀ ਨਾਇਕਿ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੁ ਨ ਦੇਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghar kee naaeik ghar vaas na devai |
lines.english: She has become the mistress of my home, and she does not allow me to live in it.
or those who tirelessly read the Simritees and study the Vedas. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਟਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਜੋਗ ਸੰਨਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: tatt teerath na chhoddai jog saniaas |
lines.english: She has not spared even the river banks, the sacred shrines of pilgrimage, the Yogis and Sannyaasees,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਖੰਡ ਜੀਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰ ॥
lines.translit: nau khandd jeete sabh thaan thanantar |
lines.english: but she has overwhelmed the nine continents, all places and interspaces.
Wherever I sit, she sits there with me.
She has imposed her power upon the whole world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਛੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਇਆ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hochhee saran peaa rehan na paaee |
lines.english: Seeking meager protection, I am not protected from her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਮੀਤਾ ਹਉ ਕੈ ਪਹਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kahu meetaa hau kai peh jaaee |3|
lines.english: Tell me, O my friend: unto whom should I turn for protection? ||3||
I heard of His Teachings, and so I have come to the True Guru.
I have met God, O Nanak, and I have become care-free. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur har har naam mohi mantru drirraaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru has implanted the Mantra of the Lord's Name, Har, Har, within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਅਨੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar vasiaa gun gaae anantaa |
lines.english: And now, I dwell in the home of my own inner self; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਆਮਰਿ ਹਮ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਏ ਦਰਬਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: eih aamar ham gur kee darabaaree |1| rahaau doojaa |4|4|
lines.english: She is now my servant, and the Guru has made me intimate with the Lord. ||1||Second Pause||4||4||
My home is now my own, and she is now my mistress.
Second, they advised me to send two men.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
First, they advised me to send a letter.
Third, they advised me to make the effort and do something.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਹੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mai sabh kichh chhodd prabh tuhee dhiaaeaa |1|
lines.english: But I have renounced everything, and I meditate only on You, God. ||1||
Now, I am totally blissful, carefree and at ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਮਨ ਦੂਤ ਮੁਏ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dusaman doot mue sukh paaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The enemies and evil-doers have perished, and I have obtained peace. ||1||Pause||
You are my only Support, You are my only Court. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੀ ਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karee su teraa taan |
lines.english: Whatever I do, is by Your Almighty Power.
The True Guru has imparted the Teachings to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਦੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh har kaa des |
lines.english: My soul, body and everything belong to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕਉ ਕਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: tere sevak kau kis kee kaan |
lines.english: Who else is Your servant to serve?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧਨੋ ਛੋਡਿ ਜਾਈਐ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈਂ ਧਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tudhano chhodd jaaeeai prabh kain dhar |
lines.english: If I were to renounce You, God, unto whom could I turn?
There is no other, comparable to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਕਹ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeh keh raakh laihi gal laae |
lines.english: Wherever I am, you save me, hugging me close in Your embrace.
The faithless cynics are deluded; they wander around in the wilderness. ||3||
Your Glorious Greatness cannot be described.
God has preserved his honor, and congratulations are pouring in. ||4||5||
Nanak, Your slave, has entered Your Sanctuary.
